name: @dignetwork/dig-capsule-wasm-dev
description: Build harness for the @dignetwork/dig-capsule-wasm npm package (the dig-capsule crate's `wasm` read-crypto surface). Not published; `npm run build:pkg` assembles the publishable ./pkg from the root crate built with `--no-default-features --features wasm`.

scripts.build:web: wasm-pack build .. --release --target web --out-dir wasm-npm/pkg-web --out-name dig_client -- --no-default-features --features wasm
scripts.build:node: wasm-pack build .. --release --target nodejs --out-dir wasm-npm/pkg-node --out-name dig_client -- --no-default-features --features wasm
scripts.build:pkg: npm run build:web && npm run build:node && node scripts/assemble-pkg.mjs
scripts.test:pkg: node scripts/assemble-pkg.mjs --verify-only || (npm run build:pkg) ; node scripts/verify-pkg.mjs
scripts.smoke: cargo run --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml --no-default-features --features crypto,wasm --example gen_smoke_fixture > smoke_fixture.json && node smoke.mjs
